node.text: Sam is on a diet and determined to live healthier.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Sam is determined to make changes in his lifestyle, like reducing soda and candy intake.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 3 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Sam is trying to eat healthier and recently trying to eat less processed food, but has made no changes yet.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: Sam is now a Weight Watchers coach in their group, feeling proud and accomplished.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: Sam sees becoming a Weight Watchers coach as a great step in their quest for better health.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.90)

node.text: Sam has noticed positive changes from the diet, such as more energy and less sluggishness after eating.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "limiting himself to diet") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.74)

node.text: Sam had a tough week and had a check-up with the doctor where the weight wasn't great.
Sam agreed to give swapping soda for flavored seltzer water and candy for dark chocolate a try.
Sam's friends mocked his weight last Friday, which hurt him.
Sam is determined to continue making a positive impact through coaching and staying committed to better health.
